privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for tiddly_wiki_env build_power_consumption_audit task by confirming that the expected appliance tiddlers (Refrigerator, LED Lights, Laptop, Starlink Router, Water Pump) are synthetically generated via setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected initial_total (3240 Wh) exactly matches the sum of the power draw calculations. Furthermore, confirmed that the injected Microwave (200 Wh) in export_result.sh perfectly brings the injected_total to 3440 Wh. Also discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
